resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def findMaxK(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        num_set = set(nums)
        k = -1
        for num in num_set:
            if -num in num_set and num > k:
                k = num
        return k if k != -1 else -1
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses a set to store the input array, allowing for efficient lookups of the negative counterparts of each number. It then iterates through the set to find the largest positive integer k such that -k also exists in the set.
